case_title: ARVIND VED VS. BHADRESH JHAVERI et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ARVIND VED'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS - THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS WERE PROVIDED AT THE HEARING. ARGUED AND THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION IN PART, JUDGMENT TO ENTER IN THE AMOUNT OF $25,000 + $600 IN COSTS, NO ATTORNEY'S FEES. ORDER & JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077

Ntc And Motion For Atty'S Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Nov-02-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF ARVIND VED'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS.

APPEARANCES: Kevin Sullivan, Esq. 441-1052 specially appearing for Michael Heath, Esq. of Law Offices of Michael Heath 931-4207 for pltf & moving party; Bhadresh B. Jhaveri, 510/770-1989 deft & opposing party in propria persona.

RULING: The Court vacated its tentative ruling as courtesy copies of the opposition papers were provided at the hearing. Argued and the Court granted the motion in part, judgment to enter in the amount of $25,000 + $600 in costs, no attorney's fees. Order & judgment signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
